2603.20704.title: NDT: Non-Differential Transformer and Its Application to Sentiment Analysis
2603.20704.paper_summary: From customer feedback to social media, understanding human sentiment in text is central to how machines can interact meaningfully with people. However, despite notable progress, accurately capturing sentiment remains a challenging task, which continues to motivate further research in this area. To this end, we introduce Non-Differential Transformer (NDT). It is inspired by (but in contrast to) the state-of-the-art Differential Transformer (DT) model. While standard Transformers can struggle with irrelevant context, the sota DT model uses attention map subtraction, potentially for noise cancellation. We explore an alternative motivation, hypothesizing that benefits may arise from enabling different attention components to specialize on distinct concepts within the text, similar to multiplexing information channels or mixture models, rather than primarily canceling noise via subtraction. Guided by this concept-multiplexing (ConPlex) view, the specific architecture presented in this paper employs a purely additive strategy. It uses only positive weights, learned during training, to ensure constructive combination of these specialized attention perspectives. This design choice explores positive only integration, though our broader framework also shows promise with less constrained linear combinations involving both positive and negative weights. Our model computes attention via this positively weighted sum of multiple distinct attention maps. This allows the model to constructively integrate diverse signals and potentially capture more complex contextual relationships. Competitive performance is achieved by the proposed model for Sentiment Analysis while tested on multiple datasets. We conclude by presenting our results, challenges and future research agenda in this important area of research.
2603.20704.paper_summary_zh: 從客戶反饋到社交媒體，理解文本中的人類情感是機器如何能夠與人類進行有意義互動的核心。<lb/>然而，儘管取得了顯著進展，準確捕捉情感仍然是一項具有挑戰性的任務，這持續激勵著該領域的進一步研究。<lb/>為此，我們介紹了非差分Transformer（Non-Differential Transformer，NDT）。<lb/>它的靈感來自於（但與之相對）最先進的差分Transformer（Differential Transformer，DT）模型。<lb/>雖然標準Transformer在處理無關上下文時可能會遇到困難，但最先進的DT模型使用注意力圖減法，可能用於噪聲消除。<lb/>我們探索了一種替代動機，假設通過使不同的注意力組件專注於文本中的不同概念，可能會帶來好處，這類似於多路復用信息通道或混合模型，而不是主要通過減法來消除噪聲。<lb/>在這一概念多路復用（ConPlex）視角的指導下，本文提出的具體架構採用了純粹的加法策略。<lb/>它僅使用在訓練過程中學習的正權重，以確保這些專門的注意力視角的建設性組合。<lb/>這一設計選擇探索了僅正整合，儘管我們的更廣泛框架在涉及正負權重的較不受限線性組合方面也顯示出潛力。<lb/>我們的模型通過這一正權重的多個不同注意力圖的總和來計算注意力。<lb/>這使得模型能夠建設性地整合多樣的信號，並可能捕捉到更複雜的上下文關係。<lb/>在多個數據集上測試時，所提出的模型在情感分析方面達到了競爭性的表現。<lb/>我們最後展示了我們的結果、挑戰以及在這一重要研究領域的未來研究議程。
2603.20704.author: Soudeep Ghoshal et.al.
2603.20704.authors: Soudeep Ghoshal, Himanshu Buckchash, Sarita Paudel, Rubén Ruiz-Torrubiano
